cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure this out. So the question is when Anthony could have gone to the amusement park, right? Let me start by going through each of the given time intervals and see where there's a gap in Anthony's schedule. First, Anthony woke up at 6am. Then Leslie saw him at the library from 6am to 8am. So that's 6-8am. Then Jennifer saw him at the gym from 8am to 9am. So 8-9am.
